_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_COMPONENT_DESCR: This component allows you to flexibly configure a group of buttons and links.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_BASIC_DES: This example shows three buttons without additional configuration.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_INDEX_FIR: The actions can be displayed in different ways: as a simple row, as a dropdown, or as a combination of buttons and a dropdown.
The component is rendered differently depending on the number of actions.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_HAS_DIVID: The dropdown can be displayed with or without spacing from the buttons.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_ACTIONS_C: You can assign button classes in a specific order. For example, the first button can always be primary, the second always secondary, and so on.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_DISABLED_: All buttons and the dropdown can be disabled.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_DROPDOWN_: The dropdown button can be configured. All props of ADropdown can be used inside the dropdown-attributes object.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_GROUP_EXTRA_CLA: Each action can define its own additional CSS class via the classExtra field.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_ACTIONS_C: An array of CSS classes applied to inline actions by position.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_ACTIONS_I: An array of IDs assigned to actions by position when the action itself does not define an id.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_BTN_GROUP: CSS classes for the wrapper that groups inline buttons and links.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_HAS_DIVID: Determines whether spacing is added before the dropdown part when both inline actions and dropdown actions are rendered.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_INDEX_FIR: The index of the first action that should be moved into the dropdown on desktop. A value of -1 disables dropdown grouping.
The index of the first action that should be moved into the dropdown on mobile. A value of -1 disables dropdown grouping.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_INNER_FLA: Internal flag updated via v-model:inner-flag-has-actions to indicate whether the component has visible actions after filtering.
_A_GROUP_BUTTON_DROPDOWN_PROPS_MIN_DROPD: Minimum number of actions required to render the dropdown part. If there are fewer actions, they remain inline.
